title: Fund Microgrid #1 – Urgam Valley (5 kW)
description: Install a 5 kW solar microgrid in Urgam Valley to power 12 households, a village learning room, and 2 productive-use appliances. Includes local training and telemetry for impact tracking.
title: Fund Microgrid #1 – Urgam Valley (50kW)
description: Install a 50kW solar microgrid in Urgam Valley to power 12 households, a village learning room, and 2 productive-use appliances. Includes local training and telemetry for impact tracking.
